overview: A premium AI-powered elderly care platform that monitors health vitals in real-time, sends intelligent medicine reminders with voice alerts, detects emergencies automatically, and connects seniors with caregivers — all in a beautiful, accessible interface designed for trust and ease of use.
features: Real-time AI Health Dashboard with animated vitals, charts, and wellness score
Smart Medicine Reminder System with voice synthesis and daily progress tracking
AI Emergency Detection with SOS button, full-screen alert, and emergency log
AI Health Assistant chatbot with contextual health guidance and quick actions
Caregiver Dashboard with live elderly status, emergency history, and medicine adherence
Dark/light mode, glassmorphism UI, Framer Motion animations throughout
Voice alerts via Web Speech Synthesis API for reminders and emergencies
Real-time clock, weather widget, activity tracker, and notification center
